rules.rule_text:
rule MirageAPTBackdoorSample
{
	meta:
		Description = "Backdoor.Mirage.sm"
		ThreatLevel = "5"

	strings:
		$a1 = "welcome to the desert of the real" ascii wide
		$a2 = "Mirage" ascii wide
		$b = "Encoding: gzip" ascii wide
		$c = /\/[A-Za-z]*\?hl=en/

	condition:
		(( $a1 or $a2 ) or $b ) and $c
}
